summary: Decent front‑of‑house (FOB) recording that sounds a bit distant, while the show itself is praised as smoking.
review: The four fan reviews agree the tape was captured with an ECM‑990 front‑of‑house mic array, giving it an audience‑type sound that feels somewhat remote and a little thin at the highs and lows. Despite these sonic limitations the concert is described as “smoking,” indicating strong musical performance, though no specific songs are highlighted.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality receives positive remarks while recording quality is noted as decent but distant; weighting the show (70%) and recording (30%) yields a mid‑high rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Front‑of‑house mic array (ECM‑990) creates distant, slightly thin sound with some crowd bleed; lack of top/bottom frequency response but overall listenable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewers only note the show as generally “smoking.”
